query:
INSERT INTO ai_free_token_usage (email, cost_nanos, updated_at)
         VALUES ($1, $2::bigint, now())
         ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
         SET cost_nanos = ai_free_token_usage.cost_nanos + $2::bigint,
             updated_at = now()
         WHERE ai_free_token_usage.cost_nanos < $3::bigint
         RETURNING cost_nanos
